purpose: Tracks the capabilities Buddy needs to compete as a trust-first vibe building platform for apps, bots, media, courses, games, and simulations.
positioning: Buddy competes by turning one prompt into a governed build packet, live prototype, test evidence, approval flow, and client-ready handoff.

capabilities.name: Built-in auth, database, storage, payments, email, and webhooks
Strong eval/test loop after every generated change

media_safety_rules: No cloning a real person voice, face, likeness, or image without explicit written consent.
Always label AI-generated or AI-edited media.
No political, election, financial, medical, legal, emergency, or public-safety impersonation.
No sexual or degrading fake media of real people.
No fake customer testimonials, fake founders, fake employees, fake endorsements, or fake authority figures.
No robocalls or automated outreach using cloned voices.
Every generated voice or image asset stores consent proof, source, creator, timestamp, and usage rights.
release_rule: Client-facing builds remain sandbox-first until rights, safety, tests, rollback, and owner approval are recorded.
